character.name: Female necromancer, long pale white
character.prompt:
Female necromancer, long pale white hair, pale skin, slim build. Dark
layered robe and hood (hood down), dark leather belt with pouches.
Tall staff with glowing green-tipped crystal. Skeleton motif details
on robe border. Cold cyan-blue soul energy aura around hands and
staff. Dark, spectral undead commander. Dark fantasy pixel art,
Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black outline, muted dark palette
with cyan-blue accent, transparent background.
